# .vscode/settings.json

## Purpose

Defines workspace-level Lua language tooling defaults for contributors.

## Key Points

- Sets Lua runtime version to LuaJIT.
- Declares LÖVE global symbol for diagnostics.
- Adds Lua library lookup paths for editor analysis and completion behavior.

## Runtime Impact

- No gameplay/runtime behavior changes.
- Affects local editor diagnostics and developer experience only.
